title: JORS: prepare submission for lab_archives_mcp
Implement Graph-Based Knowledge Navigation Tools
description: Add tools like get_related_pages and trace_provenance to the MCP server. These should leverage the ExperimentContext and Finding models to allow the agent to traverse the semantic graph of the research.
design: Use NetworkX graph in ProjectContext for traversal. 'get_related_pages' will query graph neighbors. 'trace_provenance' will query graph predecessors.

comments.author: samuelbrudner
comments.text: NOTE: Terminology update. 'ExperimentContext' has been renamed to 'ProjectContext' to support multi-notebook workflows.

title: Implement 'Ready-to-Work' Heuristics
description: Create a suggest_next_steps tool that analyzes the current SessionState (active experiment, recent findings) to propose logical next actions for the agent.

comments.author: samuelbrudner
comments.text: NOTE: Terminology update. 'Experiment' references should be read as 'Project' (e.g., active project context).

title: Refine Semantic Model Definitions
description: Review and expand the ExperimentContext and Finding Pydantic models in state.py. Ensure they capture sufficient metadata (e.g., confidence scores, evidence links) to support the graph traversal and heuristic tools.

title: Integrate NetworkX for Graph Modeling
description: Add 'networkx' as a project dependency to support formal graph modeling of the ProjectContext (nodes=pages, edges=links). This will power the graph navigation tools.

title: Update Onboarding for Beads Capabilities
Update Documentation for Beads Features
Formalize Beads Tests
Create Semantic Governance Documentation
Enrich project graph with timestamps and provenance edges
Add page-to-page content link edges and upgrade related page suggestions
JORS: run tests for JORS submission version
Add graph schema_version and migrations for node/edge metadata
Add pagination/limits + truncation metadata to graph queries
Add dry_run flags to mutating tools and improve error codes
Post-v0.4.0 linked-data and release follow-up
description: Track the remaining correctness, metadata, and release-verification work identified after the v0.4.0 provenance-export release. Split urgent pre-application fixes from lower-urgency post-release tooling cleanup.

title: Add Zenodo DOI identifier to CITATION.cff
description: Add an identifiers block to CITATION.cff pointing to the stable Zenodo DOI https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.17728440 so CFF consumers and metadata crawlers can discover the DOI directly from the citation metadata.

title: Add optional rdflib linked-data extras and alternate serializations
description: Introduce an optional linked-data dependency group that installs rdflib and extend the CLI so users can optionally emit Turtle or N-Quads in addition to JSON-LD.

title: Verify Zenodo v0.4.0 DOI resolution
description: Confirm that the Zenodo v0.4.0 DOI resolves correctly from public DOI endpoints and matches the intended release metadata.

title: Make JSON-LD context URL reliable by deployment or inline default
description: Make the JSON-LD context URL reliable by either deploying a stable hosted context or using an inline default so exported linked data remains valid when the hosted context is unavailable.

title: Fail loud on naive datetimes and type JSON-LD timestamp fields
description: Reject naive datetimes in linked-data export paths and add explicit typing for JSON-LD timestamp fields so provenance timestamps are unambiguous.

title: Verify wasDerivedFrom IRI minting across mixed entity kinds
description: Verify that wasDerivedFrom IRI minting behaves correctly across mixed entity kinds and yields stable provenance references.

title: Reconcile or remove stale repo_scaffolding drafts
description: Audit any stale repo_scaffolding drafts and either reconcile them with the current project state or remove them.

title: Verify MCP tool count against application materials
description: Count the current MCP tool registrations in src/labarchives_mcp/mcp_server.py, compare that count with the application claim about tool surface area, and update the application materials if the exact count wording is no longer defensible.

title: Enforce real interrogate docstring coverage threshold
description: Replace interrogate fail-under=0 with a real threshold so docstring coverage enforcement is active rather than inert.

title: Add pytest coverage fail-under threshold
description: Set a nonzero --cov-fail-under floor in the pytest configuration so coverage regressions fail CI instead of being reported passively.

title: JORS: update README for JORS (requirements, FAIR, reviewers section)
JORS: set up Zenodo archival release and update citation metadata
JORS: draft JORS software metapaper (jors_metapaper.md)
Enhance Agent Capabilities with Explicit Semantic Model
description: Implement a robust, graph-based semantic model for the agent to track experiments, findings, and provenance, moving beyond stateless interactions. This references our commitment to an explicitly defined semantic model.

title: Add commit message guidance to AGENTS.md
description: Add commit message guidance to AGENTS.md (create the file if missing). Required format: `(feat): <description of the work that was done> (prescribed by bead <ID>)`.
acceptance_criteria:
- AGENTS.md includes a Commit Messages section.
- The section specifies `(feat): <description of the work that was done> (prescribed by bead <ID>)`.
- The section includes a short example.
close_reason: Added a Commit Messages section to AGENTS.md with the required format and example; validation passed with pytest -q.
